sentence: 妈妈在阳台上种了几盆兰花。
pinyin: Māma zài yángtái shàng zhòng le jǐ pén lánhuā.
english: Mom planted several pots of orchids on the balcony.

sentence: 记者从总社发回了最新报道。
pinyin: Jìzhě cóng zǒngshè fā huí le zuìxīn bàodào.
english: The reporter sent back the latest report from the head office.

meaning: 1. having trading relations (of nations or regions)
sentence: 两国签约后开始正式通商。
pinyin: Liǎng guó qiānyuē hòu kāishǐ zhèngshì tōngshāng.
english: After the two countries signed a treaty, they began formal trade relations.

sentence: 他对这个问题进行了系统性的研究。
pinyin: Tā duì zhège wèntí jìnxíng le xìtǒngxìng de yánjiū.
english: He conducted a systematic study of this issue.

meaning: 1. vestibule; 2. small inner room (opening to others); 3. suite; 4. ap
sentence: 酒店给我们升级到了套间。
pinyin: Jiǔdiàn gěi wǒmen shēngjí dào le tàojiān.
english: The hotel upgraded us to a suite.

sentence: 客厅和餐厅用一面矮墙分隔开来。
pinyin: Kètīng hé cāntīng yòng yī miàn ǎi qiáng fēngé kāilái.
english: The living room and dining room are separated by a low wall.

sentence: 床垫里的弹簧坏了，睡起来很不舒服。
pinyin: Chuángdiàn lǐ de tánhuáng huài le, shuì qǐlái hěn bù shūfu.
english: The spring in the mattress broke, making it very uncomfortable to sleep on.

sentence: 她把旅行经历写成了一篇游记。
pinyin: Tā bǎ lǚxíng jīnglì xiě chéng le yī piān yóujì.
english: She turned her travel experiences into a piece of travel writing.

sentence: 工厂必须处理好废水才能排放。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng bìxū chǔlǐ hǎo fèishuǐ cái néng páifàng.
english: Factories must properly treat wastewater before discharging it.

sentence: 山上有一座古老的庙宇，香火很旺。
pinyin: Shān shàng yǒu yī zuò gǔlǎo de miàoyǔ, xiānghuo hěn wàng.
english: On the mountain is an ancient temple that sees many worshippers.

meaning: 1. two trees that grow together as one; 2. fig. conjugal union
sentence: 他们相爱多年，终于结为连理。
pinyin: Tāmen xiāng ài duō nián, zhōngyú jié wéi liánlǐ.
english: After loving each other for many years, they finally joined in matrimony.

sentence: 他不该在网上诋毁别人的名誉。
pinyin: Tā bù gāi zài wǎngshàng dǐhuǐ biérén de míngyù.
english: He shouldn't slander other people's reputations online.

sentence: 提高生产率是工厂的首要目标。
pinyin: Tígāo shēngchǎnlǜ shì gōngchǎng de shǒuyào mùbiāo.
english: Improving productivity is the factory's top priority.

sentence: 气候变化是一个全球性问题。
pinyin: Qìhòu biànhuà shì yīgè quánqiúxìng wèntí.
english: Climate change is a global issue.

sentence: 中国与俄罗斯接壤。
pinyin: Zhōngguó yǔ Éluósī jiērǎng.
english: China borders Russia.

meaning: 1. able to pass muster; 2. qualified; 3. apt; 4. presentable
sentence: 她的经验完全够格担任这个职位。
pinyin: Tā de jīngyàn wánquán gòugé dānrèn zhège zhíwèi.
english: Her experience is more than enough to qualify for this position.

sentence: 地铁里挤满了早高峰的上班族。
pinyin: Dìtiě lǐ jǐmǎnle zǎo gāofēng de shàngbānzú.
english: The subway is packed with office workers during the morning rush hour.

sentence: 这道题考的是定语从句的用法。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí kǎo de shì dìngyǔ cóngjù de yòngfǎ.
english: This question tests the usage of attributive clauses.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了很多石器时代的工具。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchūle hěnduō shíqì shídài de gōngjù.
english: The museum displays many Stone Age tools.

meaning: employee; person employed in a trade or profession
sentence: 餐饮行业的从业人员必须持有健康证。
pinyin: Cānyǐn hángyè de cóngyè rényuán bìxū chí yǒu jiànkāng zhèng.
english: Food and beverage industry employees must hold a health certificate.

meaning: to include; to cover; to embrace
sentence: 这个市场包罗万象，什么商品都能买到。
pinyin: Zhège shìchǎng bāoluó wànxiàng, shénme shāngpǐn dōu néng mǎidào.
english: This market has everything imaginable; you can find any product there.

sentence: 医生开了西药，让他每天饭后服用。
pinyin: Yīshēng kāi le xīyào, ràng tā měitiān fàn hòu fúyòng.
english: The doctor prescribed Western medicine and told him to take it after every meal.

sentence: 他弹钢琴的水平高超，简直是贝多芬再世。
pinyin: Tā tán gāngqín de shuǐpíng gāochāo, jiǎnzhí shì Bèiduōfēn zài shì.
english: His piano playing is superb — he's practically a reincarnation of Beethoven.

meaning: divine physician; sage doctor; highly skilled practitioner
sentence: 她是当地有名的圣手，很多疑难杂症都能治好。
pinyin: Tā shì dāngdì yǒumíng de shèngshǒu, hěn duō yínán zázèng dōu néng zhì hǎo.
english: She is a renowned healer locally and can cure many difficult ailments.

sentence: 市长任内修建了很多新学校。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng rèn nèi xiū jiàn le hěn duō xīn xuéxiào.
english: The mayor built many new schools during his term in office.

sentence: 他买了一百股普通股。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī bǎi gǔ pǔ tōng gǔ.
english: He bought a hundred shares of common stock.

meaning: final exam; to take an end-of-term exam; (Tw) college entrance exam (a
sentence: 大考前一周我几乎没睡觉。
pinyin: Dà kǎo qián yī zhōu wǒ jīhū méi shuìjiào.
english: I barely slept the week before the final exam.

sentence: 妇联组织了一场公益活动。
pinyin: Fùlián zǔzhī le yī chǎng gōngyì huódòng.
english: The women's association organized a charity event.

sentence: 这款车载导航系统非常好用。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chē zài dǎoháng xìtǒng fēicháng hǎo yòng.
english: This onboard navigation system is very easy to use.

sentence: 当时列国之间贸易往来频繁。
pinyin: Dāngshí liè guó zhījiān màoyì wǎnglái pínfán.
english: At that time, trade between various countries was very frequent.

sentence: 他特别喜欢看科教频道的节目。
pinyin: Tā tèbié xǐhuān kàn kē jiào píndào de jiémù.
english: He especially likes watching programs on the science education channel.

sentence: 这批产品主要用于外销。
pinyin: Zhè pī chǎnpǐn zhǔyào yòng yú wài xiāo.
english: This batch of products is mainly intended for export.

sentence: 最近楼市的价格涨了不少。
pinyin: Zuìjìn lóu shì de jiàgé zhǎng le bù shǎo.
english: Real estate market prices have gone up quite a bit recently.

meaning: to try sth out; trial; pilot scheme
sentence: 新政策先在两个城市试办。
pinyin: Xīn zhèngcè xiān zài liǎng gè chéngshì shì bàn.
english: The new policy will first be piloted in two cities.

sentence: 天文学家发现了一颗新的变星。
pinyin: Tiānwénxuéjiā fāxiàn le yī kē xīn de biàn xīng.
english: Astronomers discovered a new variable star.

sentence: 他小时候特别喜欢翻百科全书。
pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhòu tèbié xǐhuān fān bǎikē quánshū.
english: He loved flipping through encyclopedias when he was a kid.

sentence: 她为了健康改成了吃素食。
pinyin: Tā wèile jiànkāng gǎi chéng le chī sùshí.
english: She switched to a vegetarian diet for her health.

meaning: 1. a building of two or more stories; 2. CL:棟|栋[dòng],幢[zhuàng],座[zuò]
sentence: 村子里盖起了好几栋新楼房。
pinyin: Cūn zi lǐ gài qǐ le hǎo jǐ dòng xīn lóu fáng.
english: Several new multi-story buildings have been built in the village.

sentence: 老师今天讲课的时候用了很多图片。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jīntiān jiǎng kè de shíhou yòng le hěn duō túpiàn.
english: The teacher used a lot of pictures while teaching today.

sentence: 工程师测算了建桥所需的费用。
pinyin: Gōng chéng shī cè suàn le jiàn qiáo suǒ xū de fèi yòng.
english: The engineer measured and calculated the cost required to build the bridge.

meaning: 1. in a low voice; 2. (speak) in whispers
sentence: 图书馆里请小声说话。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ qǐng xiǎoshēng shuōhuà.
english: Please speak quietly in the library.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆的装修风格非常高雅。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn de zhuāngxiū fēnggé fēicháng gāoyǎ.
english: The décor style of this café is very elegant.

sentence: 他多年后终于重返银幕。
pinyin: Tā duō nián hòu zhōngyú chóngfǎn yínmù.
english: He finally returned to the big screen after many years.

sentence: 餐厅服务员把账单递给了我。
pinyin: Cāntīng fúwùyuán bǎ zhàng dān dì gěi le wǒ.
english: The restaurant server handed me the bill.

meaning: 1. a place famous for its scenery or historical relics; 2. scenic spot
sentence: 黄山是中国著名的名胜之一。
pinyin: Huángshān shì Zhōngguó zhùmíng de míngshèng zhī yī.
english: Huangshan is one of China's most famous scenic spots.

sentence: 这个词只有两个音节，很好记。
pinyin: Zhège cí zhǐ yǒu liǎng gè yīnjié, hěn hǎo jì.
english: This word only has two syllables, so it's easy to remember.

meaning: 1. to take in; 2. to absorb; 3. to admit; 4. to accept
sentence: 这家公司吸纳了很多刚毕业的大学生。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī xīnàle hěn duō gāng bìyè de dàxuéshēng.
english: This company has taken on a lot of recent college graduates.

sentence: 他做事太教条，不懂变通。
pinyin: Tā zuòshì tài jiàotiáo, bù dǒng biàntōng.
english: He's too dogmatic and doesn't know how to adapt.

sentence: 孩子爬上栏杆玩耍，家长赶紧把他抱下来。
pinyin: Hái zi pá shàng lán gān wán shuǎ, jiā zhǎng gǎn jǐn bǎ tā bào xià lái.
english: The child climbed up the railing to play, and the parent quickly lifted him down.

sentence: 公共场所不能大声喧哗。
pinyin: Gōng gòng chǎng suǒ bù néng dà shēng xuān huá.
english: You shouldn't make loud noise in public places.
